title: Active Lane Legacy Chrome Collapse
summary: Collapsed the older selected-lane title/stat header and duplicate tab row across every mounted lane view so the active HUD, view portals, and bounded stage become the primary cockpit.
proof: Added a global selected-lane chrome collapse rule for detail top and detail tabs.
Kept navigation in the active lane HUD view portals instead of the duplicate tab row.
Updated the standalone README, cache markers, snapshot generator, and snapshot regression floors.
